declarations.description:
Purpose: Display switch groups with optional legends, hints, and error messages
Category: Forms, Actions
When to use: Forms, Surveys, User preferences
When not to use: Decorative purposes, Non-interactive elements
Works with components: mc-switch, mc-card, mc-modal, mc-drawer
Alternative component names: User Switch Group, Switch List, Selection Box Group, Switch Buttons, Toggle Group, On/Off Group
declarations.name: McSwitchGroup

cssParts.description: The container of the fieldset that holds the switches.
cssParts.name: `fieldset-container`

slots.description: One or more <mc-switch> elements to display in the group.
The legend HTML to use for the mc-switch-group.
slots.name: `legend`

slots.description: The hint HTML to use for the mc-switch-group.
slots.name: `hint`

slots.description: The errormessage HTML to use for the mc-switch-group.
slots.name: `errormessage`

events.description: Emitted when any of the mc-switch element in the group is checked/unchecked.
events.name: change
